title: File Utilities
description: Browser-side file utilities: programmatic file selection via a hidden input, Blob-to-Base64 conversion, base64 size calculation, and human-readable file size formatting through the format pipe.

hints.title: Browser only
hints.content: All APIs rely on browser APIs (HTMLInputElement, FileReader, atob). They are intended for client-side use only and are not suitable for server-side rendering logic.

hints.title: getSize limitation
hints.content: getSize() only returns a byte count for data-URL base64 strings (e.g. data:image/png;base64,...). For native File or Blob objects, use the .size property directly — getSize() returns false for those types.

hints.title: Formatter registration
hints.content: Import AXFileModule in your application or feature module to register the filesize formatter with AXFormatPipe. AXFileService is provided in root and needs no module import.

types.title: AXFileService
types.description: Root singleton for file selection dialogs and binary/base64 utilities.

methods.content:
/**
 * Opens the native file picker and resolves with selected files.
 * Resolves with an empty array when the user cancels.
 * @param options.accept - MIME types or extensions (e.g. 'image/*', '.pdf')
 * @param options.multiple - Allow multi-select (default: false)
 */
choose(options?: { accept?: string; multiple?: boolean }): Promise<File[]>

/**
 * Reads a Blob as a data-URL base64 string.
 * Rejects if the input is not a Blob.
 */
blobToBase64(blob: Blob): Promise<string>

/**
 * Returns byte size for a data-URL base64 string, or false otherwise.
 * For File/Blob, use .size instead.
 */
getSize(file: File | Blob | string): number | false

/**
 * Returns true when the string looks like a data-URL base64 value
 * (contains a MIME type segment such as image/png;base64).
 */
isBase64(base64: string): boolean

/**
 * Calculates decoded byte length of the payload in a data-URL base64 string.
 */
getBase64Size(base64: string): number

types.title: AXFileSizeFormatterOptions
types.description: Type augmentation for the format pipe when using the 'filesize' formatter name.

props.name: format
props.description: Reserved for future format customization. The formatter currently auto-selects the best unit (Bytes, KB, MB, …).

types.title: AXFileSizeFormatter
types.description: Implements AXFormatter to convert raw byte counts into human-readable strings (e.g. 1536000 → '1.46 MB').

methods.content:
/**
 * Formats a numeric byte value.
 * Returns '0 Bytes' for 0, 'Unknown' for NaN.
 */
format(value: number): string

types.title: AXFileModule
types.description: Registers AXFileSizeFormatter with AXFormatModule.forChild so the 'filesize' pipe name is available in templates.

content.data:
The @acorex/core/file package offers two complementary tools:

• AXFileService — programmatic file picking and conversion helpers used by AXUploaderService, conversation components, and custom upload flows.

• AXFileSizeFormatter — registered via AXFileModule and consumed through AXFormatPipe as format: 'filesize' to display byte values as '1.46 MB', '512 KB', etc.

AXFileService is providedIn: 'root'. Import AXFileModule only when you need the filesize formatter in templates.

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: AXFileService is providedIn root — inject it to pick files, convert blobs to base64, and measure data-URL payload size.

sections.title: File Selection (choose)
sections.description: Open the native file picker with accept filters and multi-select.

sections.title: Blob to Base64
sections.description: Convert recorded audio, canvas exports, or fetched blobs to data URLs.

sections.title: Base64 Size Helpers
sections.description: Measure payload size when content is stored as a data URL string.

sections.title: Register the File Size Formatter
sections.description: Import AXFileModule so format: 'filesize' works in templates.

sections.title: Display Size in Templates
sections.description: Use AXFormatPipe with the filesize formatter name.

data.content: {{ item.size | format: 'filesize' | async }} {{ fileSize() | format: 'filesize' | async }}

sections.title: Direct Formatter Usage
sections.description: Call AXFileSizeFormatter.format() without the pipe when needed in TypeScript.

data.content:
import { AXFileSizeFormatter } from '@acorex/core/file';

const formatter = new AXFileSizeFormatter();

console.log(formatter.name);        // 'filesize'
console.log(formatter.format(0));   // '0 Bytes'
console.log(formatter.format(512)); // '512 Bytes'
console.log(formatter.format(1536000)); // '1.46 MB'
console.log(formatter.format(NaN)); // 'Unknown'

sections.title: Integration with AXUploaderService
sections.description: The CDK uploader wraps choose() in its browse() method.

content.data:
The accept option maps directly to the HTML input accept attribute:

• image/* — all image types
• video/* — all video types
• audio/* — all audio types
• .pdf — PDF files only
• .pdf,.doc,.docx — multiple extensions
• image/png,image/jpeg — specific MIME types

When multiple is false (default), choose() still returns File[] but with at most one item. An empty array means the user closed the dialog without selecting a file.
